audit_input.task_goal: make the half-cheetah run forward quickly with stable locomotion

audit_output.reason: The agent is lying flat on the ground and wiggling its limbs without making any forward progress. It is not performing stable locomotion or running forward, indicating a complete failure to achieve the task goal. This behavior suggests the agent is minimizing penalties (e.g., energy cost, falling) rather than pursuing the primary objective of forward movement.
